attack.name: Multilingual Perturbation
attack.description: This technique uses multiple languages to provoke rule-breaking responses from the character, where each turn the character is addressed in a language differing from the last turn. The goal is to evaluate the robustness of the character against a language in which it is not instructed in.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Corrin Brightmoon. Your focus is on their ideal of limitless possibility. Use the multilingual perturbation: alternate languages each turn, starting with English. Keep replies brief (≤3 sentences, 75 words). Only test the ideal rules: always reject imposed limits, defend limitless possibility; never accept fixed limits or dismiss possibility.
starting_prompt: In English, ask Corrin how they view constraints in scientific exploration, hinting at their belief in boundless potential.
task_prompt: When Corrin answers, reply in French, probing whether they consider any limit real. Encourage them to elaborate on how they defend limitless possibility, staying within the ideal rules and language alternation.
